title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
